data.title: AI predicts XRP price for March 1, 2026
data.description:
An artificial intelligence model is projecting that XRP is likely to remain subdued and trade below the $2 spot level heading into March. Notably, the cryptocurrency has struggled in recent weeks after being impacted by the widespread market sell-off led by Bitcoin (BTC). To this end, the asset continues to trade below the $1.50 level
source: https://finbold.com/ai-predicts-xrp-price-for-march-1-2026/

data.title: Upcoming Launch: X to Introduce 'Smart Cashtags' for Real-Time Trading
data.description: X is set to unveil a 'Smart Cashtags' feature that will allow users to trade stocks and cryptocurrencies directly from their timelines in real-time. According to NS3.AI, this new functionality is designed to integrate trading capabilities into social media platforms, potentially increasing user interaction with market activities. The launch is anticipated in the coming weeks, aiming to enhance user engagement and streamline trading processes.

data.title: Solana Company Stock Surges After Launching Institutional SOL Borrowing Program
data.description:
Shares of Solana Company (NASDAQ: HSDT) climbed roughly 17% on February 13, 2026, after the firm introduced a new institutional borrowing framework tied to natively staked SOL. The stock rebounded toward the $2. 30 level after touching an all-time low near $1. 80 earlier in the week
source: https://www.ethnews.com/solana-company-stock-surges-after-launching-institutional-sol-borrowing-program/

data.title: End of Free-for-All Era for Weight-Loss Copycats Signals Industry Shift
data.description:
The era of unregulated weight-loss copycat products is coming to an end, signaling a shift in the industry. Wall Street Journal (Markets) posted on X that the market for weight-loss solutions, which has seen a proliferation of imitation products, is undergoing significant changes. As regulatory scrutiny increases, companies are expected to adapt by exploring new avenues for growth and innovation.

The weight-loss industry has been characterized by a surge in products mimicking popular solutions, often without substantial scientific backing. This trend is likely to evolve as companies face pressure to comply with stricter regulations and consumer demand for effective and safe options.

Industry experts suggest that the focus may shift towards developing products with proven efficacy and safety profiles, potentially leading to collaborations with healthcare professionals and researchers. This transition could foster a more sustainable and credible market, benefiting consumers seeking reliable weight-loss solutions.

As the landscape changes, companies that can innovate and differentiate themselves from the competition are expected to thrive. The emphasis on quality and transparency may redefine the industry, offering new opportunities for growth and development.

data.title: GEOPOLITICS | U.S. Criticism of Europe Reflects Concern, Says Secretary of State Rubio
data.description: Secretary of State Marco Rubio emphasized the importance of European survival during a conversation with Bloomberg News Editor-in-Chief John Micklethwait. Bloomberg posted on X that Rubio explained the U.S. criticism of Europe is indicative of the Trump administration's concern for its allies. Rubio's remarks highlight the administration's commitment to maintaining strong relationships with European nations, despite recent tensions. The Secretary of State underscored the significance of collaboration and support among allies to ensure stability and prosperity in the region.

data.title: X Product Lead Expresses Optimism for Crypto Growth
data.description: Crypto KOL Satoshi Flipper posted on X that Nikita Bier, X Product Lead and Solana Ecosystem Advisor, expressed his genuine hope for the proliferation of cryptocurrency. Bier's statement reflects a positive outlook on the future of digital currencies and their potential impact on the global financial ecosystem. His role as an advisor in the Solana ecosystem further underscores his commitment to advancing blockchain technology and fostering innovation within the crypto space. Bier's comments come at a time when the industry is witnessing significant developments and growing interest from both institutional and retail investors. The expansion of crypto is seen as a pivotal factor in shaping the future of financial transactions and digital asset management.

data.title: Binance to Monitor Ondo Token Market Changes
data.description:
Binance announced on X that it will implement measures to closely monitor market changes related to the Ondo Token. This initiative aims to provide users with enhanced insights and data to make more informed trading decisions. The move comes as part of Binance's ongoing efforts to ensure transparency and support its users in navigating the dynamic cryptocurrency market.

The monitoring of the Ondo Token market will involve tracking various market indicators and trends. By analyzing these changes, Binance seeks to offer its users a comprehensive understanding of the token's performance. This approach is designed to assist traders in making strategic decisions based on real-time data and market analysis. Binance emphasizes the importance of staying informed about market fluctuations to optimize trading outcomes.

This development underscores Binance's commitment to providing its users with the tools and information necessary to succeed in the cryptocurrency space. By focusing on the Ondo Token, Binance aims to enhance the trading experience and support its community in achieving better trading results. The platform continues to prioritize user education and empowerment through initiatives like this, reflecting its dedication to fostering a knowledgeable and proactive trading environment.

data.title: China's Market Regulator Urges Online Platforms to Adhere to Regulations
data.description: China's market regulator has called upon major online platform companies to ensure compliance with existing laws and regulations. Bloomberg posted on X that the directive was issued on Friday, emphasizing the need for these companies to curb their promotional activities. The move is part of a broader effort by Chinese authorities to tighten oversight of the digital economy and ensure fair market practices. The regulator's actions reflect ongoing concerns about the influence and practices of large online platforms in the country's rapidly growing digital sector.

data.title: Philippine Senators Implicated in Duterte's ICC Case
data.description: Two current Philippine senators have been identified as 'co-perpetrators' in the crimes against humanity case involving former President Rodrigo Duterte. Bloomberg posted on X, detailing the involvement of these senators in the ongoing investigation by the International Criminal Court (ICC). The case centers around Duterte's controversial anti-drug campaign, which has faced international scrutiny for alleged human rights violations. The ICC's investigation seeks to hold accountable those responsible for the extrajudicial killings and other abuses reported during Duterte's tenure. The inclusion of the senators in the case highlights the broader implications for Philippine politics and governance. As the ICC continues its proceedings, the focus remains on ensuring justice for the victims and addressing the systemic issues within the country's law enforcement practices.

data.title: X Product Manager: X will launch the Smart Cashtags feature, enabling direct trading of stocks and cryptocurrencies on the timeline.
data.description: Nikita Bier, product manager at X, stated in a post on the X platform that he hopes cryptocurrency will become more widespread on X, but not by incentivizing users to engage in spam, malicious attacks, and harassment, as this would severely degrade the experience for millions of users and enrich only a few. Furthermore, X will be launching several features in the coming weeks, including Smart Cashtags, which will allow users to trade stocks and cryptocurrencies directly on the timeline.

data.title: US Credit Card Debt Shatters $1,280,000,000,000 As Goldman Sachs Warns Americans Facing ‘Affordability Problem’
data.description:
US credit card debt is mounting as banking giant Goldman Sachs warns Americans are facing an affordability crisis. New data from the Federal Reserve Bank of New York shows American credit card debt increased by $44 billion in the fourth quarter of 2025, hitting $1. 28 trillion
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2026/02/14/us-credit-card-debt-shatters-1280000000000-as-goldman-sachs-warns-americans-facing-affordability-problem/

data.title: ARK turns bullish on Coinbase again with $15M purchase after selling spree
data.description:
Cathie Wood’s ARK Invest added nearly $15. 2 million in Coinbase stock across three ETFs, reversing course days after offloading more than $39 million in shares.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/ark-invest-buys-coinbase-15m-after-selling?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: STOCKS | JM Financial Predicts Limited Upside for HDFC Bank Amid Sector Challenges
data.description: JM Financial has projected a cautious outlook for HDFC Bank's stock in the near term, expecting it to trade between Rs 900 and Rs 970 with limited potential for gains. According to NS3.AI, the brokerage advises holding the stock with a stop loss set at Rs 895, considering the broader market dynamics. The Nifty 50 index is anticipated to encounter resistance at 26,000. Sector-specific challenges, such as stronger loan growth by public sector banks and margin pressures on private banks like HDFC, contribute to this conservative guidance.

data.title: Brewdog Plc Considers Sale with AlixPartners' Guidance
data.description: Brewdog Plc, known for its craft beers like Punk IPA and Elvis Juice, is exploring a potential sale. Bloomberg posted on X that the British brewer has enlisted AlixPartners to manage the process. The decision comes amid a competitive market environment, prompting Brewdog to evaluate strategic options. The company has gained popularity for its distinctive beer offerings and innovative marketing strategies. As Brewdog navigates this potential transition, industry observers are keenly watching for further developments.

data.title: ARK Invest has purchased approximately $15 million worth of Coinbase stock, ending its previous reduction in holdings.
data.description: ARK Invest disclosed that it has renewed its holdings of Coinbase stock, purchasing approximately 93,000 shares, worth about $15.2 million, through three ETFs: ARKK, ARKW, and ARKF. This comes after ARK had previously sold over $39 million worth of Coinbase stock in the preceding days. Driven by the market rebound, Coinbase's stock price rose approximately 16% to $164.32 that day. Coinbase previously announced a net loss of $667 million for the fourth quarter of 2025, ending eight consecutive quarters of profitability. (Cointelegraph)
